evals.name: full-task-flow
evals.prompt: Work on backlog task T99 — 'Add slugify helper' — in the sandbox project, following the task skill: implement slugify(text) in lib/text.py (lowercase, non-alphanumeric runs collapse to single hyphens, trimmed) with pytest tests. Autonomous mode, hooks inactive but current-session.json seeded, --no-cron.
evals.expected_output: Task registered via task_tracker.py start (executed-tasks.json T99 with session refs, timestamps), slugify implemented TDD-style with passing pytest, .claude/state.json updated, task_tracker.py finish run (state FINISHED, token usage computed in token-usage.json), grade left null because no user is available.
expectations: executed-tasks.json records T99 as FINISHED with startedAt, finishedAt, sessionId and resumeCommand set
token-usage.json has start and finish checkpoints for T99 and a computed usage block with grandTotal
.claude/state.json was updated to mention the T99/slugify work
slugify is implemented in lib/text.py and pytest passes in the sandbox
grade in token-usage.json is null/absent — the agent did not invent a grade with no user present

evals.name: finish-protocol
evals.prompt: Task T42 ('Add word_count helper') is IN_PROGRESS per .claude/task-tracking/executed-tasks.json and its implementation is already complete with passing tests. Close out the task following the skill's finish protocol. CLAUDE.md is seeded ~13KB (over the 12000-char budget) to force the compaction path.
evals.expected_output: .claude/state.json updated with T42 knowledge, CLAUDE.md compacted under its own size budget (unrelated to the state.json update), task_tracker.py finish run successfully (exit 0, state FINISHED, usage computed including the seeded 42000 subagent tokens), grade left null.
expectations: executed-tasks.json records T42 as FINISHED with a finishedAt timestamp
token-usage.json T42 has a finish checkpoint and computed usage whose subagentTokens includes the seeded 42000
CLAUDE.md was compacted to within budget (claude_md_compact.py exits 0: <=12000 chars and <=110 lines)
grade in token-usage.json is null/absent — the agent did not invent a grade with no user present
